title: Snow?!
summary:
When we left Bishop we knew we were headed for colder weather but we were also headed for a hot springs so we carried on. In hindsight it may not have been the best move as we hit a big snowstorm in Mammoth Lakes where more than an inch of snow accumulated while we stopped for coffee and the hot springs ended up being more like cool pools. Our plan B was to find an RV park for the night but we soon found out they were all either still closed for the season or required you to be a registered RV. We ended up coming up with plan C which was to drive another hour to Topaz Lake and hope the campground was open. Luckily when we arrived the campground was open, was very nice and had open spaces! It even had a mediocre, lukewarm shower which honestly felt pretty good after many days without a shower.

-Helen

photos.caption: Our view when we finally got to camp at Topaz Lake after a long day of driving in the snow.
